name: Baked Fish Fillet
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the fillets with salt and pepper.
2. Place a sheet pan in the oven, preheating to 400-500°F (200-250°C).
3. Melt butter in the hot pan until it just begins to brown.
4. Add lemon juice and white wine to the melted butter.
5. Place the fillets into the butter mixture and return the pan to the oven.
6. Cook for 10-15 minutes, then remove from the oven.
7. Flip the fillets and baste with lemon juice and wine.
8. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and paprika.
9. Return the pan to the oven for an additional 5 minutes until the cheese is melted and lightly browned.
